mapper.sql: id, title, description, cover_image, max_participants, current_participants, points_type_id, points_amount, activity_type, status, start_time, end_time, rules, create_user_id, create_time, update_time, points_granted, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO u_activity ( title, description, cover_image, max_participants, current_participants, points_type_id, points_amount, activity_type, status, start_time, end_time, rules, create_user_id, create_time, update_time, points_granted, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{coverImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maxParticipants,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{currentParticipants,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pointsTypeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pointsAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{activityType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{rules,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), 0, 0 )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM u_activity WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE u_activity
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cover_image = #{coverImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
max_participants = #{maxParticipants,jdbcType=INTEGER},
points_type_id = #{pointsTypeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
points_amount = #{pointsAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
activity_type = #{activityType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
rules = #{rules,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM u_activity WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM u_activity WHERE is_deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM u_activity WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status NOT IN (3, 4) AND start_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NOT NULL AND start_time <= NOW() AND end_time > NOW() AND current_participants < max_participants ORDER BY start_time ASC LIMIT #{offset,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM u_activity WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status NOT IN (3, 4) AND start_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NOT NULL AND start_time <= NOW() AND end_time > NOW() AND current_participants < max_participants
mapper.update: UPDATE u_activity SET current_participants = current_participants + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND current_participants < max_participants
UPDATE u_activity SET current_participants = current_participants - 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND current_participants > 0
mapper.select: SELECT current_participants FROM u_activity WHERE id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE u_activity SET status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM u_activity WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status NOT IN (3, 4) AND points_granted = 0 AND end_time < NOW() AND end_time IS NOT NULL AND points_amount > 0 ORDER BY end_time ASC LIMIT 50
mapper.update: UPDATE u_activity SET points_granted = #{pointsGranted,jdbcType=TINYINT}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM u_activity WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status NOT IN (3, 4) AND start_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY end_time ASC LIMIT 200
